## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Lab OS Layer

- [ ] L0 Lab OS
- [ ] L1 Architecture
- [ ] L2 Engineering Case
- [ ] L3 Validation
- [ ] L4 Specification

## Workflow Artifacts

- Issue:
- Task Brief:
- Design Doc:
- Simulation Case or Measurement Plan:
- Specification:

Use `N/A` only when the PR is a small L0 documentation or repository maintenance change.

## Confidentiality Check

- [ ] No proprietary MPCVD recipes or process know-how.
- [ ] No restricted process parameters or chamber design details.
- [ ] No customer data, supplier pricing, or confidential project details.
- [ ] No unreviewed internal measurements or unverified performance metrics.
- [ ] Sensitive sources are referenced only by sanitized identifier.
- [ ] Public/customer-facing language has been reviewed for confidentiality and tone.

## Claim Safety Check

- [ ] No validation data, yield data, reliability data, thermal metrics, or material performance claims were invented.
- [ ] Technical claims have a basis, assumption statement, or validation path.
- [ ] Outputs include explicit assumptions and a validation path.
- [ ] Customer-facing conclusions are preliminary unless supported by reviewed evidence.

## API Use Check

- [ ] API was not used.
- [ ] If API was used, the use was necessary, reviewed, and limited to a permitted decision-gate task.
- [ ] No confidential full case files were sent to an API.

## Engineering Review Checklist

- [ ] Scope matches the issue or task brief.
- [ ] Assumptions are explicit.
- [ ] Technical claims are cited, verified, or marked as provisional.
- [ ] Risks and open questions are documented.
- [ ] Reviewers can understand the change without access to restricted information.

## Recommended Labels

Suggested labels:

- `layer:<L0-L4>`
- `type:<task-brief/design-doc/simulation/measurement-plan/spec/literature-note>`
- `status:ready-for-review`
- `domain:<thermal/materials/device-integration/simulation/measurement>`
- `priority:<P0/P1/P2>`
